hero.headline: Build faster with NovaTech
hero.description: The platform that helps modern teams ship products 3x faster with AI-assisted workflows, real-time collaboration, and zero DevOps overhead.

features-header.title: Built for teams who move fast

features.title: AI-Powered Workflows
features.description: Automate repetitive tasks with intelligent agents that learn your team's patterns and adapt over time.

features.title: Real-Time Collaboration
features.description: Work alongside your team simultaneously with conflict-free editing, live cursors, and instant sync.

features.title: Zero DevOps Overhead
features.description: Deploy globally in seconds. No servers to manage, no pipelines to maintain — we handle all the infrastructure.

team.name: Sarah Chen
team.bio: Former engineering lead at Stripe. Obsessed with developer experience and building things that last.

team.name: Marcus Okafor
team.bio: Designed products used by millions at Figma and Notion. Believes great design is invisible.

team.name: Priya Nair
team.bio: PhD in distributed systems. Led infrastructure at Cloudflare before joining NovaTech.

pricing-hero.headline: Plans for every team
pricing-hero.description: Start free, scale as you grow. No hidden fees, cancel anytime.

pricing-plans.name: Starter
pricing-plans.description: Perfect for individuals and small projects.

pricing-plans.name: Pro
pricing-plans.description: For growing teams that need more power.

faq-header.title: Frequently asked questions
faq-header.subtitle: Can't find the answer? Chat with our team.

faqs.question: Can I change plans later?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect immediately and billing is prorated.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: All paid plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers for annual plans.

pricing-cta.headline: Still not sure? Try it free.
pricing-cta.subtext: No credit card. No commitment. Cancel anytime.

about-mission.headline: We're on a mission to eliminate DevOps friction
about-mission.body1: NovaTech was founded in 2021 by a team of engineers frustrated with the complexity of modern deployment pipelines. We believed there had to be a better way.
about-mission.body2: Today we serve over 50,000 teams across 90 countries, helping them ship products faster and with more confidence than ever before.

values.title: Speed over perfection
values.description: We ship fast, learn from real users, and iterate constantly. Done is better than perfect.

values.title: Trust by default
values.description: We hire great people and trust them to do great work. No micromanagement, ever.

values.title: Radical transparency
values.description: We share everything — metrics, failures, and strategy — with our team and our customers.

values.title: Long-term thinking
values.description: We optimise for decades, not quarters. Sustainable growth over short-term wins.

milestones.title: Founded in San Francisco
milestones.description: Three engineers quit their jobs to build a better way to ship software.

milestones.title: $8M Seed Round
milestones.description: Raised seed funding from Accel and Y Combinator. Grew to 12 team members.

milestones.title: 10,000 customers
milestones.description: Hit 10K paying customers. Launched AI workflows feature.

milestones.title: 50,000+ teams globally
milestones.description: Expanded to 90 countries. Series B of $60M. 200+ team members worldwide.

about-cta.headline: Want to join the team?
about-cta.subtext: We're hiring across engineering, design, and sales.
